tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow-Agent-HTTP"
        set uuid 9cc3af58-2534-51f1-8dc2-09321212e962
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "Host-Ubuntu"
        set dstaddr "Public-DNS"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 3
        set name "Allow-Agent-ICMP"
        set uuid a2411dee-2534-51f1-a909-50971eb4a17b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "Host-Ubuntu"
        set dstaddr "WAN-Gateway"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 4
        set name "Throttle-Other-ICMP"
        set uuid a82340ca-2534-51f1-f6e5-1d9c8f4abe09
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "WAN-Gateway"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall shaper traffic-shaper
config firewall shaper traffic-shaper
    edit "high-priority"
        set maximum-bandwidth 1048576
        set per-policy enable
    next
    edit "medium-priority"
        set maximum-bandwidth 1048576
        set priority medium
        set per-policy enable
    next
    edit "low-priority"
        set maximum-bandwidth 1048576
        set priority low
        set per-policy enable
    next
    edit "guarantee-100kbps"
        set guaranteed-bandwidth 100
        set maximum-bandwidth 1048576
        set per-policy enable
    next
    edit "shared-1M-pipe"
        set maximum-bandwidth 1024
    next
    edit "ICMP-Throttle"
set guaranteed-bandwidth 100
        set maximum-bandwidth 100
        set priority low
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy 2
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Allow-Agent-HTTP"
        set uuid 9cc3af58-2534-51f1-8dc2-09321212e962
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "Host-Ubuntu"
        set dstaddr "Public-DNS"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
        set traffic-shaper "high-priority"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy 3
config firewall policy
    edit 3
        set name "Allow-Agent-ICMP"
        set uuid a2411dee-2534-51f1-a909-50971eb4a17b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "Host-Ubuntu"
        set dstaddr "WAN-Gateway"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy 4
config firewall policy
    edit 4
        set name "Throttle-Other-ICMP"
        set uuid a82340ca-2534-51f1-f6e5-1d9c8f4abe09
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "WAN-Gateway"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
        set traffic-shaper "ICMP-Throttle"
    next
end
